x-component.description: Create a template-based scoping report based on word count and leverage annotations. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

projectName.title: Name of the project
projectName.description: Name of the project to be displayed in the report

customTemplateString.title: Custom template string:
customTemplateString.description: String for directly specifying the report template

outputPath.title: Output path:
outputPath.description: Full path of the report to generate
